case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. D & J ENTERPRISES, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED OCT-02-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT D & J ENTERPRISES, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED OCT-02-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DYAL, DAVE
DECLARATION ANSON LOUIE FILED RE: COPIES MADE AS BUSINESS RECORD (EVID CODE 1521, 1550) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT D & J ENTERPRISES, LLC DYAL, DAVE POOLE, JERRY POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: ONE 2000 LEEBOY 10000 ASPHALT PAVER, WHICH EQUIPMENT COLLECTIVELY HAS A FAIR MARKET, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $10,410.22 DAMAGES, $1,375.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $360.00 COSTS, $270.75 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,415.97, OF $8,000.00 AND IS ENTITLED TO ITS IMMEDIATE POSSESSION , SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2008, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
